name: gocam
documentation:
# gocam

GO CAM Data Model (Python)

## Website

[https://geneontology.github.io/gocam-py](https://geneontology.github.io/gocam-py)

## About

Example yaml/json

```yaml
id: gomodel:568b0f9600000284
title: Antibacterial innate immune response in the intestine via MAPK cascade (C.
  elegans)
taxon: NCBITaxon:6239
status: production
comments:
- 'Automated change 2023-03-16: RO:0002212 replaced by RO:0002630'
- 'Automated change 2023-03-16: RO:0002213 replaced by RO:0002629'
activities:
- id: gomodel:568b0f9600000284/57ec3a7e00000079
  enabled_by: WB:WBGene00006575
  molecular_function:
    evidence:

      reference: PMID:15625192

```

functions.name: gocam.cli.cli
documentation: A CLI for interacting with GO-CAMs.

functions.name: gocam.cli.fetch
documentation: Fetch GO-CAM models.

functions.name: gocam.cli.convert
documentation: Convert GO-CAM models.

classes.name: gocam.datamodel.gocam.ModelStateEnum
documentation: Status of a model

classes.name: gocam.datamodel.gocam.Model
documentation: A model of a biological program consisting of a set of causally connected activities

classes.name: gocam.datamodel.gocam.Activity
documentation: An individual activity in a causal model, representing the individual molecular activity of a single gene product or complex in the context of a particular model

classes.name: gocam.datamodel.gocam.EvidenceItem
documentation: An individual piece of evidence that is associated with an assertion in a model

classes.name: gocam.datamodel.gocam.Association
documentation: An abstract grouping for different kinds of evidence-associated provenance

classes.name: gocam.datamodel.gocam.EnabledByAssociation
documentation: An association between an activity and the gene product or complex that carries it out

classes.name: gocam.datamodel.gocam.EnabledByGeneProductAssociation
documentation: An association between an activity and a gene product

classes.name: gocam.datamodel.gocam.EnabledByProteinComplexAssociation
documentation: An association between an activity and a protein complex

classes.name: gocam.datamodel.gocam.CausalAssociation
documentation: A causal association between two activities

classes.name: gocam.datamodel.gocam.TermAssociation
documentation: An association between an activity and a term, potentially with extensions

classes.name: gocam.datamodel.gocam.MolecularFunctionAssociation
documentation: An association between an activity and a molecular function term

classes.name: gocam.datamodel.gocam.BiologicalProcessAssociation
documentation: An association between an activity and a biological process term

classes.name: gocam.datamodel.gocam.CellularAnatomicalEntityAssociation
documentation: An association between an activity and a cellular anatomical entity term

classes.name: gocam.datamodel.gocam.CellTypeAssociation
documentation: An association between an activity and a cell type term

classes.name: gocam.datamodel.gocam.GrossAnatomyAssociation
documentation: An association between an activity and a gross anatomical structure term

classes.name: gocam.datamodel.gocam.MoleculeAssociation
documentation: An association between an activity and a molecule term

classes.name: gocam.datamodel.gocam.Object
documentation: An abstract class for all identified objects in a model

classes.name: gocam.datamodel.gocam.TermObject
documentation: An abstract class for all ontology term objects

classes.name: gocam.datamodel.gocam.PublicationObject
documentation: An object that represents a publication or other kind of reference

classes.name: gocam.datamodel.gocam.EvidenceTermObject
documentation: A term object that represents an evidence term from ECO

classes.name: gocam.datamodel.gocam.MolecularFunctionTermObject
documentation: A term object that represents a molecular function term from GO

classes.name: gocam.datamodel.gocam.BiologicalProcessTermObject
documentation: A term object that represents a biological process term from GO

classes.name: gocam.datamodel.gocam.CellularAnatomicalEntityTermObject
documentation: A term object that represents a cellular anatomical entity term from GO

classes.name: gocam.datamodel.gocam.MoleculeTermObject
documentation: A term object that represents a molecule term from CHEBI or UniProtKB

classes.name: gocam.datamodel.gocam.CellTypeTermObject
documentation: A term object that represents a cell type term from CL

classes.name: gocam.datamodel.gocam.GrossAnatomicalStructureTermObject
documentation: A term object that represents a gross anatomical structure term from UBERON

classes.name: gocam.datamodel.gocam.PhaseTermObject
documentation: A term object that represents a phase term from GO or UBERON

classes.name: gocam.datamodel.gocam.InformationBiomacromoleculeTermObject
documentation: An abstract class for all information biomacromolecule term objects

classes.name: gocam.datamodel.gocam.GeneProductTermObject
documentation: A term object that represents a gene product term from GO or UniProtKB

classes.name: gocam.datamodel.gocam.ProteinComplexTermObject
documentation: A term object that represents a protein complex term from GO

classes.name: gocam.datamodel.gocam.TaxonTermObject
documentation: A term object that represents a taxon term from NCBITaxon

classes.name: gocam.datamodel.gocam.PredicateTermObject
documentation: A term object that represents a taxon term from NCBITaxon

classes.name: gocam.datamodel.gocam.ProvenanceInfo
documentation: Provenance information for an object

functions.name: gocam.translation.minerva_wrapper._normalize_property
documentation:
Normalize a property.

Sometimes the JSON will use full URIs, sometimes just the local part

functions.name: gocam.translation.minerva_wrapper._annotations
documentation:
Extract annotations from an object (assumes single-valued).

Annotations are lists of objects with keys "key" and "value".

functions.name: gocam.translation.minerva_wrapper._annotations_multivalued
documentation:
Extract annotations from an object (assumes multi-valued).

Annotations are lists of objects with keys "key" and "value".

classes.name: gocam.translation.minerva_wrapper.MinervaWrapper

methods.name: gocam.translation.minerva_wrapper.MinervaWrapper.models
documentation:
Iterator over all GO-CAM models from the index.

This method fetches the list of all GO-CAM models from the index URL. For each model, the
Minerva JSON object is fetched and converted to a Model object.

```
return

Iterator over GO-CAM models

rtype

Iterator[Model]
```

methods.name: gocam.translation.minerva_wrapper.MinervaWrapper.models_ids
documentation:
Iterator over all GO-CAM IDs from the index.

This method fetches the list of all GO-CAM models from the index URL and returns an
iterator over the IDs of each model.

```
return

Iterator over GO-CAM IDs

rtype

Iterator[str]
```

methods.name: gocam.translation.minerva_wrapper.MinervaWrapper.fetch_minerva_object
documentation:
Fetch a Minerva JSON object for a given GO-CAM ID.

```
param gocam_id

GO-CAM ID

type gocam_id

str

return

Minerva JSON object

rtype

Dict
```

methods.name: gocam.translation.minerva_wrapper.MinervaWrapper.fetch_model
documentation:
Fetch a GO-CAM Model for a given GO-CAM ID.

```
param gocam_id

GO-CAM ID

type gocam_id

str

return

GO-CAM Model

rtype

Model
```

methods.name: gocam.translation.minerva_wrapper.MinervaWrapper.minerva_object_to_model
documentation:
Convert a Minerva JSON object to a GO-CAM Model.

```
param obj

Minerva JSON object

type obj

Dict

return

GO-CAM Model

rtype

Model
```

An Wrapper over the current GO API which returns "Minerva" JSON objects.
